revision.text:
{{otheruses|the latest nine Black Lion Weapon sets vendors|the Halloween weapons|Black Lion Weapons Specialist (Halloween)|Privateer weapons|Black Lion Weapons Specialist (Privateer Weapons)}} {{NPC infobox | image = Lionguard human heavy 1 (weaponless).jpg | random = yes | icon = Weaponsmith.png | location = Armistice Bastion; Dwayna High Road; Interdisciplinary Accessium; Memorial Quadrant; Mistlock Sanctuary; Reckoner's Terrace; Trade Commons; Eastern Ward; Trader's Forum; Havoc's Heir | race = Charr, Human, Norn | service = Vendor | gallery1 = Lionguard norn heavy 4 (weaponless).jpg | gallery1-text = Norn appearance. | organization = Black Lion Trading Company }} [[Black Lion Weapons Specialist]]s are [[vendor]]s where players can redeem their [[Black Lion Claim Ticket]]s. They can be found next to [[Black Lion Trader]]s in [[Trading Post]] buildings in every [[city]] and [[lounge]].
== Locations == ;[[Ascalon]] * [[Black Citadel]] ** [[Memorial Quadrant]]
;[[Kryta]] * [[Divinity's Reach]] ** [[Dwayna High Road]]
* [[Lion's Arch]] ** [[Eastern Ward]] *** [[The Vaults]] ** [[Trader's Forum]]
* [[Gendarran Fields]] ** [[Havoc's Heir]] <small>(Only accessible with a [[Captain's Airship Pass]])</small>
;[[Maguuma Jungle]] * [[Rata Sum]] ** [[Interdisciplinary Accessium]]
* [[The Grove]] ** [[Reckoner's Terrace]]
;[[Shiverpeak Mountains]] * [[Hoelbrak]] ** [[Trade Commons]]
;[[The Mists]] * [[Armistice Bastion]] <small>(Only accessible with a [[Armistice Bastion Pass]])</small> * [[Mistlock Sanctuary]] <small>(Only accessible with a [[Mistlock Sanctuary Passkey]])</small>
== Items offered == {{inventory|black lion claim ticket}}
== Dialogue == :Welcome to the Black Lion Trading Company. If you've got a claim ticket, or enough scraps of one, I can show you some of our rarest and most interesting merchandise. :{{dialogue icon|more}} ''Tell me about new weapon opportunities.'' ::Check back often, as we discover new weapons, or have special ticket pricing on different weapon sets. ::{{dialogue icon|more}} ''Will these weapons always be available?'' :::We endeavor to keep most weapon types available, but as weapon supplies decrease, our prices will rise considerably. :::{{dialogue icon|end}} ''I'll be back.'' ::{{dialogue icon|sell}} ''I'd like to upgrade my soulbound permanent gathering tool.'' <small>'''(If you have old soulbound permanent gathering tools)'''</small> ::{{dialogue icon|end}} ''I get the gist.'' :{{dialogue icon|sell}} ''Show me what you've got.'' :{{dialogue icon|end}} ''I'll be back.''
== Notes == * New Black Lion weapon skins are usually introduced at a rate of one Black Lion Claim Ticket. The price is eventually increased to three tickets, usually at the same time as a new skin is introduced. * Skin sets are regularly removed from the vendor to open up space for new sets, but may return in the future. [[Lauren Kamieniecki]] hinted in 2015 there might be some improvements to these vendors so that skins are always available.<ref>[https://forum-en.gw2archive.eu/forum/support/bugs/Zodiac-Weapons-gone-from-merchant/first#post5015369 Lauren Kamieniecki on Official Forums]</ref>. However, as of 2024, this has not been implemented. * To check which skins you have already unlocked, see [[Black Lion Claim Ticket/Skin unlocks]].
== Trivia == * The Black Lion Specialist in Lion's Arch will exchange the following discontinued [[soulbound]] unlimited gathering tools for the equivalent account bound version. You need to have a soulbound version of the item in your inventory (i.e. unequipped) to exchange your tool. ** {{item icon|Jack-in-the-Box Scythe}} ** {{item icon|Bone Pick}} ** {{item icon|Chop-It-All Logging Axe}} ** {{item icon|Consortium Harvesting Sickle}} ** {{item icon|Molten Alliance Mining Pick}} * The ability to convert soulbound gathering tools to account bound ones was added as part of [[The Nightmares Within]].
== References == <references/>
[[de:Schwarzlöwen-Waffenspezialist]] [[es:Especialista en armas del León Negro]] [[fr:Spécialiste des armes du Lion noir]]

revision.comment: New page: '{{otheruses|the [[skin]] unlocked in the [[wardrobe]]|the consumable item|Painter's Brilliance Axe Skin}} {{Skin infobox | type = Axe | set = Painter's Brilliance weapon skins | acquisition = Obtained from Black Lion Chests or Black Lion Weapons Specialists using Black Lion Claim Tickets. | id = 13726 }} [[Painter's Brilliance Axe]] is a Axe [[skin]] that is part of the [[Painter's Brilliance weapon skins]] set. == Acquisition == {{skin list}}'
/* top */ +Update acquisition text per bot request
revision.text:
{{otheruses|the [[skin]] unlocked in the [[wardrobe]]|the consumable item|Abaddon Axe}} {{Skin infobox | name = Abaddon Axe | icon = Abaddon Axe.png | type = Axe | set = Abaddon weapon skins | collection = Abaddon's Weapon Collection | acquisition = Obtained from the [[Vintage Black Lion Weapon Box]], which can be acquired by trading [[Black Lion Claim Tickets]] to [[Black Lion Weapons Specialist|Black Lion Weapons Specialists]]. | id = 7295 | gallery1 = Abaddon Axe.jpg }} [[Abaddon Axe (skin)|Abaddon Axe]] is a [[skin]] that is part of the [[Abaddon weapons]] set.
== Acquisition == {{skin list}}

{{NPC infobox | icon = Black Lion Chest Merchant.png | location = Arborstone; Memorial Quadrant; Outer Ring; Dwayna High Road; Trader's Forum; Interdisciplinary Accessium; Reckoner's Terrace; Trade Commons; Arborstone | race = Human, Charr, Sylvari | organization = Black Lion Trading Company | gallery1 = Black Lion Chest Merchant (charr).jpg | service = Merchant }} [[Black Lion Chest Merchant]] are [[merchant]]s offering to exchange [[Black Lion Statuette]]s. They can be found in all main cities near [[Trading Post]]s. Their inventory usually changes with the release of a new [[Black Lion Chest]].
== Locations == ;[[Cantha]] * [[Arborstone]]
;[[Ascalon]] * [[Black Citadel]] ** [[Memorial Quadrant]]
;[[Horn of Maguuma]] * [[The Wizard's Tower]] ** [[Outer Ring]]
;[[Kryta]] * [[Divinity's Reach]] ** [[Dwayna High Road]] ** [[Plaza of Balthazar]] *** [[Royal Terrace]]<sup>1</sup> * [[Gendarran Fields]] ** [[Snowblind Peaks]] *** [[Havoc's Heir]]<sup>2</sup> * [[Lion's Arch]] ** [[Eastern Ward]] <small>(inside the Vaults)</small> ** [[Trader's Forum]] <small>(inside the Trading Post)</small>
;[[Maguuma Jungle]] * [[Rata Sum]] ** [[Interdisciplinary Accessium]]
* [[The Grove]] ** [[Reckoner's Terrace]]
;[[Shiverpeak Mountains]] * [[Hoelbrak]] ** [[Trade Commons]]
;[[Crystal Desert]] * [[Crystal Oasis]] ** [[Bay of Elon]] *** [[Lily of the Elon]]<sup>3</sup>
;[[Heart of Maguuma]] * [[Verdant Brink]] ** [[Noble's Folly]]<sup>4</sup>
;[[Ring of Fire]] * [[Ember Bay]] ** [[Lava Lounge]]<sup>5</sup>
;[[The Mists]] * [[Mistlock Sanctuary]]<sup>6</sup> * [[Armistice Bastion]]
:<sup>1</sup><small>Only accessible with a [[Royal Pass (2 weeks)]] or [[Royal Terrace Pass]]</small> :<sup>2</sup><small>Only accessible with a [[Captain's Airship Pass (single use)]], [[Captain's Airship Pass (2 weeks)]], or [[Captain's Airship Pass]]</small> :<sup>3</sup><small>Only accessible with a [[Invitation to "Lily of the Elon"]]</small> :<sup>4</sup><small>Only accessible with a [[Noble's Folly Pass (2 weeks)]] or [[Noble's Folly Pass]]</small> :<sup>5</sup><small>Only accessible with a [[Lava Lounge Pass (2 weeks)]] or [[Lava Lounge Pass]]</small> :<sup>6</sup><small>Only accessible with a [[Mistlock Sanctuary Passkey (2 weeks)]] or [[Mistlock Sanctuary Passkey]]</small>
== Items offered == {{main|Black Lion Statuette/historical|label=For previous contents, see}} {{inventory|statuette}}
== Notes == * The [[Game updates/2023-02-28|February 28, 2023]] reworked the interface and adjusted the offers, lowering the price of many items. All former [[Black Lion Exclusives Chest]] items will be permanently available for purchase for statuettes once they leave the Black Lion Chest itself. ** The update introduced three new tabs: *** New Black Lion Chest Exclusives: Items in this category cost 60 statuettes. *** Recent Black Lion Chest Exclusives: Items in this category cost 45 statuettes. *** Vintage Black Lion Chest Exclusives: Items in this tab are priced according to their category. For example, weapon skins cost 25 statuettes. ** Exclusive items will move down the lists of available stock and into the next tab as new items are introduced over time.
[[de:Schwarzlöwen-Truhen-Kaufmann]] [[es:Mercader de cofres del León Negro]] [[fr:Marchand de coffre du Lion noir]]
